description: BTC surges +15% in a week on cooling US CPI inflation data
Silvergate Bank and Silicon Valley Bank collapse — crypto banking fears, BTC drops
BTC rebounds sharply as markets stabilize after SVB collapse
Ethereum Shapella upgrade completes — ETH staking withdrawals enabled, positive for crypto
SEC sues Binance, charges with operating unregistered exchange
SEC sues Coinbase — continued regulatory sell-off across crypto markets
BlackRock files for Bitcoin spot ETF with SEC — major institutional signal
BTC flash crash -10% from ~$29k to ~$26k on liquidation cascade
US court rules SEC was wrong to reject Grayscale Bitcoin ETF — legal win for crypto
False report of iShares Bitcoin ETF approval causes brief +10% pump then reversal
BlackRock Bitcoin ETF ticker appears on DTCC website — renewed ETF speculation pump
BTC breaks $44k for first time since April 2022 on ETF optimism
SEC approves Bitcoin Spot ETFs from BlackRock, Fidelity and others
First trading day of Bitcoin Spot ETFs — record volume, high volatility
BTC reclaims $60k for first time since November 2021 bull run peak
BTC breaks its 2021 all-time high of ~$69k setting a new ATH
BTC reaches new all-time high of approximately $73,750
Pre-halving volatility — BTC drops sharply to around $60k
Bitcoin fourth halving — block reward cut from 6.25 to 3.125 BTC
SEC approves Ethereum spot ETF applications — bullish signal for crypto broadly
BTC drops approximately 10% on stronger than expected US jobs data macro sell-off
German government begins selling confiscated BTC holdings — $3B supply overhang
German government completes BTC sales — selling pressure lifts, price rebounds
Global market crash driven by Japan carry trade unwind, BTC drops approximately 15%
Continued sell-off from Japan carry trade unwind across all risk assets
US Federal Reserve cuts interest rates 50 basis points — risk assets including BTC pump
BTC breaks $65k resistance — momentum building ahead of US election
US Election Day — Trump wins presidency, BTC begins historic post-election rally
BTC surges past $75k driven by Trump election victory and pro-crypto policy expectations
BTC crosses $90k for the first time in history
BTC crosses $100k for the first time ever — historic milestone
BTC reaches all-time high of approximately $108,000
Fed signals fewer rate cuts in 2025 — BTC flash crashes from ~$108k
Trump inauguration — BTC volatile with initial pump then sharp correction
Trump signs executive order creating Presidential Working Group on digital assets
BTC flash crash from ~$90k to ~$78k on tariff war escalation fears
BTC drops sharply below $90k amid broader risk-off sentiment and macro uncertainty
Trump announces US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve — executive order signed
BTC drops below $80k as Strategic Reserve disappointment sets in — smaller than expected
BTC crashes below $75k on global tariff war fears — Black Monday style selloff
Trump pauses tariffs for 90 days — markets surge, BTC rebounds sharply
